title: Life Changes Everything: Discover Zac Ryan
overview: Outside an abortion clinic in 1978, Madeline Ryan is 19 years old, confused and about 12 weeks pregnant. Her 23 year-old boyfriend is a career-minded student on his way to graduate school. Madeline is hesitant, but he is determined to get this taken care of.  What follows is a unique story that will help them understand "life" changes everything!
